purpose: Pinned source manifest for Autarkic Systems and the subordinate or adjacent repositories used to define its first working requirements.

repositories.name: Autarkic Systems
repositories.status: local integration branch is ahead of public remote because push is denied to the current GitHub account
repositories.role: Umbrella project coordinating AFS, PRC, SJAS, and later executable artifacts.
repositories.note: The AS reviewed commit is the local integration baseline before ADR-0003. The commit containing this manifest necessarily advances the local repository beyond this value.

repositories.name: Autarkic Formal Systems
repositories.status: placeholder README only at reviewed snapshot
repositories.role: Named formal-systems layer that AS must make operational.

repositories.name: Pervasively Reconfigurable Computing
repositories.status: research archive with Scheme simulator and theory notes; not yet a verified AS dependency
repositories.role: Embodied substrate and reconfigurable hardware program.

repositories.name: Self-Justifying Axiom Systems
repositories.status: active research and literature archive; executable frontier partly points outside this repository
repositories.role: Formal self-confidence and self-justifying logic program.

repositories.name: Proflog
repositories.status: public main does not expose the newer Proflog ADR-006x frontier described by SJAS logs; guile proflog.scm fails with an unbound example symbol in this environment
repositories.role: Candidate semantic-tableaux implementation background for SJAS/AFS proof apparatus work.

repositories.name: leanTAP
repositories.status: reviewed as a compact transparent tableaux reference for ADR-0010; not adopted as a runtime dependency
repositories.role: Adjacent first-order classical tableaux prover reference named by SJAS ISLA notes.

verification.note: For the AS root repository, compare the manifest's reviewed_commit to the parent baseline rather than expecting HEAD equality after the manifest commit itself.
